name: Indonesian Salad (Gado-gado)
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the dressing, place the coconut in a blender container. Add 1 cup of hot water. Cover and blend on high speed for about 30 seconds.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, cook onion and garlic in oil over medium heat until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the blended coconut mixture and remaining ingredients (sugar, salt, chili powder, ground ginger). Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for about 3 minutes or until slightly thickened.
5. To prepare the salad, cover bean sprouts and cabbage with enough hot water to submerge them. Let stand for 2 minutes, then drain.
6. Cook bean curd in oil over medium heat until lightly browned. Remove with a slotted spoon and let cool.
7. Drain potatoes and cook until light brown. Remove from heat and let cool.
8. Arrange the drained ingredients on a platter. Pour the warm dressing over the salad.
